lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: The running app is in great shape; the drift sits in the project's outward-facing perimeter. Em dashes have shipped to every public Markdown file in the repo (CHANGELOG x18, PROJECT_SPEC x8, DEPLOY x6, CLAUDE x3, README x1, index.html x1) even though CLAUDE.md and scripts/discord-notify.ps1 both call the rule out explicitly. README.md describes a 20-herb database (live count 199) and references data/botanicals.js (deleted in v0.7.1) as the SVG registry. The runtime loads html2canvas from cdnjs but CLAUDE.md insists Google Fonts is the only external dep at runtime. None of this breaks the app; all of it shapes what a stranger sees on GitHub or the live site. The next polish pass should aim outward, not inward.
